# anthropic_workspace (Resource)

Manages an Anthropic organization workspace. Deletion archives the workspace; the underlying API does not support hard deletion.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "anthropic_workspace" "example" {
  name = "engineering"

  tags = {
    env  = "prod"
    team = "platform"
  }
}

output "workspace_id" {
  value = anthropic_workspace.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable workspace name.

### Optional

- `data_residency` (Attributes) Data residency configuration. Any change forces resource replacement because the API marks `workspace_geo` immutable after creation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data_residency))
- `external_key_id` (String) ID of the customer-managed encryption key (CMEK) configuration. Write-once: cannot be changed after creation.
- `tags` (Map of String) User-defined tags as string key-value pairs. Keys may not begin with `anthropic`.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp the workspace was archived, null while active.
- `compartment_id` (String) Identifier for this workspace's CMEK encryption compartment.
- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp the workspace was created.
- `display_color` (String) Hex display color assigned by the platform.
- `id` (String) Workspace ID (e.g. `wrkspc_...`).

<a id="nestedatt--data_residency"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data_residency`

Optional:

- `allowed_inference_geos` (List of String) Permitted inference geo values. Pass `["unrestricted"]` to allow all geos (the provider serializes this single-element list as the string `"unrestricted"` for the API).
- `default_inference_geo` (String) Default inference geo applied when requests omit the parameter. Defaults to `global`.
- `workspace_geo` (String) Geographic region for workspace data storage. Immutable after creation. Defaults to `us` when omitted.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import anthropic_workspace.example wrkspc_01JwQvzr7rXLA5AGx3HKfFUJ
```
